name: EMCOR Group, Inc.
description: EMCOR Group, Inc. is a leader in mechanical and electrical construction, industrial and energy infrastructure, and building services. The company designs, installs, operates, maintains, and services complex mechanical and electrical systems for a diverse range of commercial, industrial, utility, and institutional clients. Operating through numerous subsidiaries, EMCOR provides critical infrastructure solutions, including electrical, HVAC, plumbing, fire protection, and energy management systems, as well as industrial services for refineries and petrochemical plants.
